name: XL Woven Water Hyacinth Basket - Brightroom™
description:
Keep larger essentials handy with the XL Woven Water Hyacinth Basket from Brightroom™. Made from the water hyacinth plant for natural texture and beauty, the woven basket has a rectangular shape that makes it ideal for storing throw blankets, pillows, toys and more. The decorative storage basket has a lovely artisanal design that adds a new level of stylish storage to your home. Plus, integrated handles make it convenient for taking from room to room.

Overall Width: 15 Inches Top, 14 Inches Bottom
Interior Dimensions: 12.75 Inches (H), Top 14.5 Inches /Bottom 13.5 Inches (W), Top 21.5 Inches /Bottom 20.5 Inches (L))

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
